data.title: Trump's EU Tariffs Impacts Chip Equipment Giant ASML, Stock Hits 52-Week Low
data.description: ASML Holding NV (NASDAQ: ASML) stock hits 52-week low after EU tariffs. ASML makes advanced chipmaking equipment and faces $35.70B EUV market by 2032.

data.title: Sam Altman Backtracks On o3 Cancellation, Plans To Release Model In Anticipation Of GPT-5: 'People Will Be Happy'
data.description: OpenAI reverses course, plans to release o3 and o4 models in weeks before unveiling GPT-5 in 2025, competing with Google, Anthropic, DeepSeek and xAI.

data.title: Iron Ore Set To Slide Further As Trump Tariffs, China Slowdown Collide, Goldman Says
data.description: Iron ore set for declines, Goldman Sachs predicts. Chinese steel demand down 5% in 2025, exports to fall 15% due to tariffs. Australia faces economic threat.

data.title: Johnson & Johnson's Tremfya Shows Efficacy In Late-Stage Psoriatic Arthritis Study
data.description: Johnson & Johnson's Phase 3b APEX study shows Tremfya reduces symptoms and structural damage in psoriatic arthritis patients with no new safety concerns.

data.title: How Will Williams-Sonoma Offset Tariff Risks?
data.description: Analyst maintains an Outperform rating with a $220 price forecast and says Williams-Sonoma is well-positioned to navigate challenges with diversified brand portfolio, strong supply chain, and flexible costs.
